title: fuzzer: extract deterministic invariant tests from fuzz targets 🌪️
summary: Extracted invariant tests from cargo-fuzz targets (`fuzz_toml_config.rs`, `fuzz_run_json.rs`, `fuzz_scan_args.rs`) into deterministic proptest suites in their respective crates (`tokmd-config`, `tokmd-core`, `tokmd-scan-args`) to bypass local ASAN linker failures and provide consistent test coverage for parser and input surfaces.
proof_summary: Created deterministic proptest fallback tests for 3 fuzz targets and ran them successfully.
